description: The function checks if the start time is before the end time in the candidate downtime window.
The function returns False and the existing downtime slots if the candidate downtime window overlaps with any existing downtime slot.
The function checks if the candidate downtime window overlaps with any existing downtime slot using the overlaps function.
The function merges the candidate downtime window with the existing downtime slots and returns True along with the merged list sorted in ascending order.
The function enters the branch if the candidate downtime window overlaps with the current existing downtime slot.
The function enters the branch if the candidate downtime window does not overlap with the current existing downtime slot.
The function iterates over each existing downtime slot to check for overlaps with the candidate downtime window.
